name: A Modest Legacy
short_description: Welcome to A Modest Legacy, a medieval, real time strategy game. Here you will use city building and combat tactics to conquer your enemies in hopes to be the last kingdom standing. Good luck!
detailed_description:
Explore the world of A Modest Legacy, where you must fight to create your kingdom while taking down your enemies. A Modest Legacy is a real time strategy, roguelite, single-player game where you must work to grow your cities, outposts, and armies, all while keeping your population fed and ready for war.



Create your kingdom by constructing buildings, researching technology, and managing your resources. Build up to 20 different building types to create your own unique kingdom every time. Build a Citadel to gain buffs from the gods, or a market to trade with your allies. Your kingdom will need good technology, so don’t forget to research all of the topics you’ll need.



Conquer your enemies by creating an adorable yet powerful army. But don’t stop there. Construct catapults, battering rams, boats, and more to destroy your enemies’ kingdoms. You must coordinate your army and artillery to capture your enemies' keeps before they reach yours. Battle up to 9 AI controlled kingdoms to be the last kingdom standing.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
